title: fix(deps): update module tags.cncf.io/container-device-interface to v0.8.1
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [tags.cncf.io/container-device-interface](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface) | `v0.8.0` -> `v0.8.1` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/tags.cncf.io%2fcontainer-device-interface/v0.8.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/tags.cncf.io%2fcontainer-device-interface/v0.8.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/tags.cncf.io%2fcontainer-device-interface/v0.8.0/v0.8.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/tags.cncf.io%2fcontainer-device-interface/v0.8.0/v0.8.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>cncf-tags/container-device-interface (tags.cncf.io/container-device-interface)</summary>

### [`v0.8.1`](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/releases/tag/v0.8.1)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/compare/v0.8.0...v0.8.1)

This is a bugfix release.

Fixed bugs:

-   [#​253](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/issues/253)

Trying to create an autorefreshed CDI Cache should not result any more in a SIGSEGV and panic if fsnotify watch creation fails. Watch creation can fail,  for instance, when the process is out of file descriptors.

#### What's Changed

-   \[release/0.8] don't crash in cache refresh/update with nil fsnotify watcher. by [@​klihub](https://redirect.github.com/klihub) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/255](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/255)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/compare/v0.8.0...v0.8.1

</details>
